turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE
turns.text: Mr. S£rauss? Q Mr. Strauss, I notice that on your amicus brief there is no HEW lawyer on it. Can you represent to the Court that that brief represents the views of HEW? A Surely, Your Honor. Q I assume it does. A Our general practise is not to put lawyers the names of the lawyers in the Department on our brief. case is submitted. entitled matter was concluded.)
